description_long: This is a lifelike brown horse with a sleek, muscular build and a short, black mane and tail. The coat is a rich chestnut brown, with subtle shading and highlights that accentuate the contours of its body. Its ears are upright and alert, and the eyes are expressive, giving the animal a sense of awareness and intelligence. The hooves are dark and well-defined, and the legs are sturdy, showing realistic musculature. The mane is short and slightly tousled, while the tail is long and full, hanging straight down. There is no visible tack or equipment, and the horse appears healthy and well-groomed.
description: A realistic brown horse with a short black mane and tail, muscular build, and expressive features. The coat is sleek and well-groomed, with no visible tack or equipment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the horse, highlighting its muscular body, short mane, and alert expression.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the length and fullness of the tail, as well as the broad back and hindquarters.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the body, the mane's texture, and the stance of the legs.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the horse's head, alert ears, expressive eyes, and the positioning of the front legs.
attribute_pose: The horse is standing in a relaxed but alert posture.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is short, natural, and slightly tousled.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are on the ground, with the front left leg slightly forward in a natural stance.
